summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hotel Booking Platform MVP. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI 95% functional with minor authentication session persistence issue.

integration_issues.issue: User session doesn't persist when navigating to protected routes like /extranet, causing redirect to login page

passed_tests: All 17 backend API endpoints working correctly
Homepage loads with hero section, search console, destinations, features
Search console functional with destination, dates, guests selection
Destination cards clickable and navigate to search
Login page loads with proper form elements
Registration page loads and form submission works
User registration successful with role selection
User dashboard shows correct user info and role
Cities API returns Turkey cities correctly
Hotel creation, room creation, rate plan creation working
Booking creation with mock payment working
JWT authentication working for API calls
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue - user sessions should persist across page navigations to protected routes. Currently users get redirected to login when accessing /extranet after successful registration/login.
